scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard content: three notice types with correct descriptions, pebble_custom_notice event, per-container observation, event attributes (key, type, last_data). Adds legitimate extra detail on workload CLI usage, unit testing patterns, and repeat-after flag.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — event.notice.last_data, event.notice.occurrences, testing.Notice, and pebble notify --repeat-after all exist in the respective frameworks/tools
